title: Stay Positive
author: Jon Gordon
subline: A simple thought can change a day, a life, the world.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A scale. Left side has a heavy + sign, right side has multiple - signs. The + side dips down and is RED. The beam of the scale is at an angle. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- The fulcrum: a triangle -->
    <path d="M 0 240 L -60 100 L 60 100 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- The beam: a line tilted (left side down) -->
    <line x1="-540" y1="80" x2="540" y2="-40" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Left pan (lower = heavier) with a giant + sign in RED -->
    <line x1="-540" y1="80" x2="-540" y2="240" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <ellipse cx="-540" cy="260" rx="100" ry="20" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- A massive red + sign hanging over the left pan -->
    <line x1="-590" y1="140" x2="-490" y2="140" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="10"/>
    <line x1="-540" y1="90" x2="-540" y2="190" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="10"/>
    <!-- Right pan (lighter, with 4 minus signs) -->
    <line x1="540" y1="-40" x2="540" y2="120" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <ellipse cx="540" cy="140" rx="100" ry="20" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- 4 small minus signs -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3">
      <line x1="510" y1="80" x2="540" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="525" y1="60" x2="555" y2="60"/>
      <line x1="540" y1="100" x2="570" y2="100"/>
      <line x1="525" y1="40" x2="555" y2="40"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A small label arrow at the fulcrum -->
    <text x="0" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">BALANCE</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">A SINGLE PLUS CAN OUTWEIGH MANY MINUSES</text>
</svg>
rationale: A balance scale tipping to the LEFT. The left pan holds one big RED + (10px stroke), the right pan holds four small ash - signs. The single plus outweighs the minuses. The beam tilts decisively. Title 320px uppercase, two lines, weight 500.
